title: Close out Phase 3: epic retro, then flesh out Phase 4 (kgh) into ticks
description:
The close-out task per the roadmap convention (skills/ticks/SKILL.md, Roadmaps section).

1. Final review of the epic's diff (skills/ticks/ changes): consistency across SKILL.md and claude-runner.md — the action map, meta-work ticks, and resume procedure must agree with each other and with the phase 2 CLI behavior they describe; verify cross-references resolve.
2. Run the epic-close retro (claude-runner.md, Epic-close retro): harvest, promote by tier, compact .tick/learnings.md (150-line cap), outside-in verification of spec §3 against the skill text, drift review, retro report as close reason.
3. Sync the installed skill copy at ~/.claude/skills/ticks/ with skills/ticks/ (straight file copy, verify with diff -rq).
4. Flesh out Phase 4 (epic kgh — tk roadmap, TUI/tickboard roadmap views, base-branch field, learnings lint) into ticks per its rough scope, using the foundation-first partitioning procedure and re-reading .tick/learnings.md first. Note: kgh includes UI work in internal/tickboard/ui — per CLAUDE.md use pnpm, ticks-* components, Catppuccin Mocha; partition so Go CLI ticks and UI ticks can run in parallel (disjoint files).

kgh is NOT gated, so per the two-tier stopping rule execution flows on into Phase 4 unless the human says otherwise.
acceptance_criteria: Epic diff reviewed and retro report written as close reason; installed skill synced; kgh has child ticks incl. its own close-out task
